detail.comment: AUTO measures projected screen coverage to choose the same presentations used by the manual controls: close/HIGH, mid/MED, far/LOW, or glyph/removal/OFF. The first three are authored geometry rungs; OFF is the end state, showing strategic entity glyphs while removing vegetation and effect geometry. One hysteresis (hysteresisLevel, in L units) covers every AUTO transition. rebuildBudgetPerFrame caps how many entity meshes may rebuild per frame during camera sweeps; entities over budget keep their previous rung until a later frame. Entity glyphs fade in on top of the still-opaque LOW model, then replace that model after the glyph threshold.

featureMinRung.comment: Rung at/above which each named feature is built: far=1, mid=2, close=3. 'far' features survive until the glyph flip; 'close' features shed first when zooming out.

animation.comment: Live per-frame animation shedding (no mesh rebuild). Below unitAnimationMinRung, barrel spin freezes and locomotion rigs (tread scroll, wheel spin, leg gait, floor clamps) update every locomotionFarFrameStride frames with accumulated dt instead of every frame. Building animators (wind/extractor/radar/solar) freeze below buildingAnimationMinRung.

effectSpawnScale.comment: Per-authored-rung spawn scales. AUTO resolves to exactly one of these three values; glyph/removal spawns no effect geometry.
